executives.name: Daniel Breeze
executives.background: Mr. Breeze has served as Vice President, Corporate Development of RGLD Gold (Canada) since 2018. He joined Royal Gold in 2011.

executives.name: David Harquail
executives.background: Mr. Harquail is the Chair of the Board. He was the CEO of Franco-Nevada from its IPO in 2007 until 2020. He has served on numerous mining industry boards.

executives.name: Simon Fish
executives.background: Independent Director. Former General Counsel of BMO Financial Group and Vale S.A.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and General Counsel
